summary: Implementation is correct and well-tested. One P1 blocker: PR has merge conflicts with main (implement.json and test.json conflict with PR #462). Rebase onto main and keep 457-branch versions of .legion/ handoff files. All code changes are approved — timeout infrastructure is sound, 16 new tests pass, TypeScript clean, lint clean.

findings.description: PR has merge conflicts with main. implement.json and test.json conflict with changes from PR #462. Implementer must rebase onto main and keep 457-branch versions of .legion/ handoff files.

notes: Code quality is high. The timeout mechanism (scheduleTimeout + clearTimeout + finalize idempotency) is correctly implemented. Workflow docs updated correctly across 4 workflows. Only blocker is the merge conflict.
